simple_types.name: Processor_State
simple_types.code:
type Processor_State is (
  Running,
  Exception_Raised,
  FIN,
  DEADLOCK,
  WAIT);

simple_types.name: Task_State
simple_types.code:
type Task_State is (
  Completed,
  Delayed,
  Ready,
  Running,
  Exception_Raised,
  Critical,
  WaitRendzv,
  WaitSem,
  …,
  Terminated);

enumeration_literals.name: Ready
enumeration_literals.description: HAC is currently tested on this:

enumeration_literals.name: Exception_Raised
enumeration_literals.description: SmallAda tasking stuff, not tested yet:

array_types.name: Entry_Queue
array_types.code: type Entry_Queue is array (1 .. Defs.entry_table_max) of EHeader;

array_types.name: Stack_Type
array_types.code: type Stack_Type is array (1 .. Defs.StMax) of Data_Type;

array_types.name: Task_Control_Blocks
array_types.code: type Task_Control_Blocks is array (TRange) of Task_Control_Block;

record_types.name: EHeader

fields.name: Task_Index
fields.description: index of task that contains entry

fields.name: First
fields.description: ptr to first node in rendzv queue

fields.name: Last
fields.description: ptr to last  node in rendzv queue

record_types.name: Enode

fields.name: Task_Index
fields.description: index of task enqueued for rendzv

record_types.name: General_Register

fields.name: Special
fields.description: I is used for most uses: indices in the stack, Integers, Bools, Chars and Enums.

record_types.name: Interpreter_Data

fields.name: Snap
fields.description: Snapshot flag to display scheduler status

fields.name: SWITCH
fields.description: invoke scheduler on next cycle flag

fields.name: TIMER
fields.description: set to end of current task's time slice

record_types.name: PriCB
Task_Control_Block

fields.name: T
fields.description: index of current top of stack

fields.name: B
fields.description: index of current base of stack

fields.name: DISPLAY
fields.description:
Stack base index per nesting level,

used for addressing variables.

fields.name: STACKSIZE
fields.description: Stack overflow is raised if exceeded.

subtypes.name: Running_or_in_Exception
subtypes.code: subtype Running_or_in_Exception is Processor_State range Running .. Exception_Raised;

subtypes.name: Scheduler_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Scheduler_Type is Integer range Single_Task .. 6;

subtypes.name: TRange
subtypes.code: subtype TRange is Integer range 0 .. Defs.TaskMax;

constants.name: GR_Abstract_Console
constants.code:
GR_Abstract_Console : constant General_Register :=
  (Special => Defs.Text_Files,
   I       => 0,
   Txt     => Abstract_Console);

subprograms.name: Allocate_Text_File
Free_Allocated_Contents
Get_String_from_Stack
subprograms.code: function Get_String_from_Stack (ND : Interpreter_Data; Idx, Size : Integer) return String

subprograms.name: Pop
subprograms.code: procedure Pop (ND : in out Interpreter_Data; Amount : Positive := 1)

subprograms.name: Push
subprograms.code: procedure Push (ND : in out Interpreter_Data; Amount : Positive := 1)

generic_instantiations.name: Dispose
generic_instantiations.code: procedure Dispose is new Ada.Unchecked_Deallocation (Enode, Eptr);

generic_instantiations.name: File_Vectors
generic_instantiations.code: package File_Vectors is new Ada.Containers.Vectors (Positive, File_Ptr);
